David J. Cook, Esq. of COOK COLLECTION ATTORNEYS PC, T:415.989.4730, for plaintiff/moving party;

RULING: There being no objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order, And Turnover Order is Granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed in open court.
